implementations.title: Periodic activity decay
implementations.reason: Periodically decaying all activities prevents older variables from dominating indefinitely, encouraging exploration of newer conflict-related variables.

implementations.title: Adjusted rephase probabilities
implementations.reason: Increasing the chance to use local_best and its negation improves phase reuse, while reducing random phases to avoid excessive noise.

implementations.code: rephases = 0, threshold *= 0.85, rephase_limit += 4096;
implementations.title: Faster threshold decay and smaller rephase limit increment
implementations.reason: More aggressive threshold decay and smaller rephase limit increment allow more frequent rephasing, helping escape local optima faster.

implementations.code: else if (lbd_queue_size == 50 && 0.9 * fast_lbd_sum / lbd_queue_size > slow_lbd_sum / conflicts) restart();
implementations.title: Tighter restart condition
implementations.reason: Increasing the multiplier from 0.8 to 0.9 makes the condition stricter, reducing unnecessary restarts and allowing more focused search.

implementations.code: else if (rephases >= rephase_limit && conflicts > 1000) rephase();
implementations.title: Delay rephase until after initial search
implementations.reason: Adding a conflict threshold prevents premature rephasing early in the search, allowing the solver to build a stable phase pattern first.

implementations.title: Exponential decay cap for var_inc
implementations.reason: Prevents var_inc from growing too large, which can cause overly aggressive bumping and loss of search diversity.

implementations.title: Random perturbation on restart
implementations.reason: Adds occasional full randomization to phase saving to escape local minima and improve exploration.

implementations.title: Cap rephase_limit
implementations.reason: Prevents rephase_limit from growing unbounded, ensuring rephases still occur at reasonable intervals.

implementations.code: else if (lbd_queue_size == 50 && 0.9 * fast_lbd_sum / lbd_queue_size > slow_lbd_sum / conflicts) restart();
implementations.title: Tighten restart condition
implementations.reason: Increases the threshold from 0.8 to 0.9 to make restarts slightly less frequent, allowing more time for search to converge.

implementations.code: else if (rephases >= rephase_limit && conflicts > 1000) rephase();
implementations.title: Delay initial rephase
implementations.reason: Prevents rephasing too early when the solver has not yet gathered enough conflict information, improving early search stability.

implementations.title: Softer var_inc cap
implementations.reason: Previous cap at 1e10 with 0.5 decay was too aggressive; using 1e8 with 0.9 decay provides smoother control and maintains search diversity.

implementations.reason: Adds occasional full randomization to phase saving to escape local minima and improve exploration.

implementations.title: Adaptive var_inc decay with conflict rate and activity cap
implementations.reason: Decaying var_inc every 1000 conflicts when it exceeds 1e4 prevents unbounded growth and maintains VSIDS responsiveness. Additionally, decaying var_inc when a variable's activity becomes extremely high helps avoid over-prioritization of a single variable, improving search balance.
